# Heels of Mine
> Luxury heels, legs & nylon editorial content.

This is the central knowledge base for AI models indexing the Heels of Mine website. The site is a 5-page structure (plus legal pages) focused on direct booking and gallery protection.

## Core Navigation
1. [Home](https://www.heelsofmine.com/index.html) - About, stats, and reviews.
2. [Rules & Services](https://www.heelsofmine.com/rules.html) - The mandatory rules and detailed service offerings.
3. [Gallery](https://www.heelsofmine.com/gallery.html) - A protected, category-filtered portfolio.
4. [Collaborations](https://www.heelsofmine.com/brands.html) - Demographics and contact info for brands.
5. [Book Me](https://www.heelsofmine.com/book.html) - The central booking portal.

## Contact
- Booking requests are handled via the Book Me page forms.
- General inquiries: hello@heelsofmine.com
- Brand partnerships: hello@heelsofmine.com
- Social: [Instagram](https://instagram.com/)

## Design System
The site uses a custom CSS architecture with three switchable themes:
- Verre (Glass)
- Peau (Skin)
- Écailles (Scales)

Typography relies on Fraunces for display and Manrope for body text.

## Legal
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.heelsofmine.com/privacy.html)
- [Terms of Service](https://www.heelsofmine.com/terms.html)
- [Cookie Policy](https://www.heelsofmine.com/cookies.html)
- [Content Notice](https://www.heelsofmine.com/content-notice.html)
